title: Hydery Waffle Tea Towels 100% Cotton – Pack of 5, Super Soft & Absorbent Kitchen Towels, Large Dish Cloths (50x70cm), Quick Dry & Long-Lasting (Assorted Colours)
features: ✔ 100% COTTON – SOFT & DURABLE Made from premium cotton, these waffle weave tea towels are ultra-absorbent and built to last, perfect for daily kitchen use.
✔ LARGE SIZE FOR ALL TASKS (50x70CM) Generously sized for drying dishes, cleaning spills, or covering baked goods. A versatile choice for busy kitchens.
✔ QUICK DRY & ECO-FRIENDLY Reusable and machine washable, these tea towels dry fast, reducing odours and waste from paper towels.
✔ STYLISH DESIGN – ASSORTED COLOURS Add a touch of elegance to your kitchen with our modern grey and white stripe pattern, ideal for any décor.
✔ PERFECT FOR HOME OR PROFESSIONAL USE Great for restaurants, catering, and bars, these long-lasting towels handle heavy-duty cleaning with ease.
description: Hydery Waffle Cotton Tea Towels – Your Everyday Kitchen Essential Upgrade your kitchen with Hydery’s 100% cotton tea towels. Designed for superior absorbency and durability, these large (50x70cm) towels make cleaning, drying, and wiping effortless. ✅ Soft & Gentle – Luxurious feel for hands and delicate cookware. ✅ Eco-Friendly – Reusable, reducing paper waste. ✅ Quick Drying – Keeps your kitchen fresh and hygienic. ✅ Versatile Use – Ideal as dish cloths, hand towels, or baking covers. With a classic striped design and assorted colours, they’re perfect for homes, cafés, and restaurants. Machine washable for easy care—wash at 40°C, avoid bleach.
